REKONNER recon the meta. deliver the reckoning.
Play

REKONNER

An auto-battle PvP strategy game.
You don't fight — you prepare. Build a team, set the formation, and let the server settle the score.

          Death prevention

            Damage calculator

            Live-computed from the actual rollDamage formula and engine constants — not a mockup.

            Click a column header to sort. Click a row for full detail.

            Archetype rosters

            What each archetype is, plus its best matchup and hardest counter.
            Member preset names are internal dev IDs, blurred out — they're not meant to be read.

            Archetype meta, from a real sweep

            The 60 active team presets are clustered into 8 archetypes by hero-role composition. Win rates are power-normalized — each matchup is adjusted by both presets' own overall win rate against the full pool, so the numbers below show which archetype counters which, not just which side has bigger stats.

            These 60 presets are hand-designed by the dev team as reference builds, not a search over every possible roster — they're a reasonable sample of the design space, not proof of what the single best team would be.

            Sharpest counters

            Largest directed win-rate edges across the whole web —
            reading a row backwards gives you the flip side for free (e.g. Burst Assassin → Control Web 78.5% also means Control Web is punished by Burst Assassin at that same rate).

              Peer matrix

              Row beats column, power-normalized win %.
              Hover a cell to trace the row/column.

              Counter web

              Node size = strong-win count · node color = net record · arrow color = win% of that matchup · dashed arrow = counter-pick.
              Hover a node to isolate its wins (green) and losses (red).
